{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211443079009E9BD96AB5FB0399F"}"},"total":447},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7489709931909464857","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"黑水兄弟三观正文风实在，人物描写活灵活现，少见的好书！[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743839768,"group_id":"7407213943514467390","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5L8ij69pGGH2on0JqFREFo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"106147882900","user_name":"爱吃葱香茄子的陈陈"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106147882900","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7407213943514467390","book_info":{"abstract":"上个世纪八十年代的东北，尤其是冰城，那是一片充满传奇色彩的江湖之地。在那个时代，可谓是“水浅王八多，遍地是大哥”。
人们常说，出门宁可撞上鬼，也别碰上这些人。
这里有鲜血挥洒的壮烈，有道义坚守的豪情，有阴险狡诈的权谋，有刀枪相向的冷酷。
世间万事皆如此复杂，更何况是这鱼龙混杂的江湖，代有猖狂之辈崛起。
本书将真实记录冰城社会大哥们长达十多年的黑道人生，其中充满残酷的争斗、凶狠的拼杀、黑暗的交易、凛冽的寒风、热血的豪情以及悲壮的命运。带你走进真正的黑道，领略真正的江湖风云。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f75b14bb869e8eeba2c2729fe676c645","author":"黑水江湖","author_id":"","book_id":"7407213943514467390","book_name":"东北江湖之冰城焦元南","book_short_name":"冰城江湖往事","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":826,"name":"黑道","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=826&name=黑道&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1460,"name":"都市江湖","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1460&name=都市江湖&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7407214074758447678","read_count":"28742","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3161496"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"581","tags":"都市日常,都市,黑道,都市江湖","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc46c1ef22617134d2eb5a377ae424988~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259387&x-signature=vvg%2FusuFHd3ZT9o%2F4Bk6QLosyk8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2604110734964379","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"316"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603211443079009E9BD96AB5FB0399F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":158178,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5090},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1743843478,"is_author_stick":false,"stic
